SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
The person might express disbelief and seek to lead the authorities to the truth. A silver tongue could not change the outcome, but a plea to sir, the judge, might offer a chance to wrap up the matter correctly. Stranger than fiction, the situation would leave many questioning justice. The words 'lead', 'silver', 'sir', and 'wrap' all find their place in this unexpected tale.
